methodsAttempted.query: site:unesp.br ChatGPT "inteligência artificial" "generativa" OR "IA generativa" estudantes docentes UNESP
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned mostly UNESP repository and journal PDFs; these were treated as research/course content rather than institutional AI policy evidence.
Firecrawl search found an official UNESP portal article announcing Resolution 13/2025, an official Jornal da Unesp article on the proposed I3A, and a sharer URL for a training announcement.
Firecrawl search found the UNESP training announcement and event pages; these were used only for context where they described training, not as the formal policy source.

methodsAttempted.query: "Resolução Unesp nº 13" "22 de abril de 2025" PDF
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official app.unesp.br PDF attachment for RESOLUÇÃO UNESP Nº 13, DE 22 DE ABRIL DE 2025, plus a DOE publication.
The official PDF attachment was fetched with Firecrawl PDF parsing and used as the primary source for policy claims.

artifacts.summary: Official discovery found a central UNESP AI resolution, Resolution 13/2025, published as an official app.unesp.br PDF and described on the UNESP portal. Training and I3A pages were recorded as official context but not treated as binding policy substitutes; repository and journal materials were rejected as research/course content.

citation.citationTitle: RESOLUÇÃO UNESP Nº 13, DE 22 DE ABRIL DE 2025

artifacts.sourceTitle: RESOLUÇÃO UNESP Nº 13, DE 22 DE ABRIL DE 2025
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: V-proteção da privacidade: a utilização da IA deve respeitar a Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (Lei 13.709/2018-LGPD), garantindo a privacidade e a segurança dos dados pessoais, com atenção especial aos dados sensíveis, e implementando medidas de segurança e proteção adequadas; VI-segurança: os sistemas de IA devem visar a segurança da sua aplicação e impactos
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The resolution links AI use to LGPD compliance, privacy and security of personal data, special attention to sensitive data, and security practices for AI systems.

artifacts.title: UNESP AI Policy Staged Review
artifacts.summary: UNESP has an official central AI-use resolution, Resolution 13/2025, covering AI use in teaching, research, extension, management, and innovation. Staged claims are limited to the resolution's stated scope, academic honesty, human validation of AI outputs, authorship disclosure, privacy/security principles, compliance measures, and a separate training-context claim. Strategy/proposal and repository materials were rejected as non-policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged bundle uses public official sources only and does not access private Moodle material, internal LegIA pages, or login-gated systems.
Training and I3A articles are implementation or strategy context, not substitutes for Resolution 13/2025.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
